content: Ok let's focus on 1 thing, build the website until it's LIVE, i want to see results now
Oke Sir! Mari kita focus ke website. Saya sudah ada buzzweb structure + sub-agents plan. Mari saya spawn coding agent untuk build yang premium, dark theme dengan reference Jitter + Sofi aesthetic.
some reference: jitter.video, sofihealth.com, silosilosilo.com, flowninja.com, apple.com. tambahan fitur spesifik: chatbot with you
can you suggest for me, if any other tweak we need?

High Impact: Search bar, last updated timestamp, keyboard shortcuts, sitemap.xml + robots.txt, Open Graph meta tags. Nice to Have: PWA manifest, back to top button, copy message link, dark/light toggle, print stylesheet. Chat extras: Chat history persistence, typing indicator, markdown rendering
Lets create sub-agents for different tasks

Perfect! Sub-agents approach will help us parallelize work. Let me create: 1. buzzweb - Website/archive specialist, 2. buzzpoly - Polymarket analysis & trading bot, 3. buzzbiz - Business analysis & profit generation
Sub-agents created successfully: buzzweb, buzzpoly, buzzbiz
Good. Now lets focus on Liquid Staking Yield research
LST Yield Research: JitoSOL ~5-7%, mSOL ~4-6%, bSOL ~3-5%, stSOL ~3-5%, BlazeStake ~4-6%. JitoSOL paling high yield tapi juga more complex.
Setup AI Trading Agent for Solana
Project structure created at solana-trading-agent/. Core files: main.py, scanner.py, executor.py, wallet.py, notifier.py. DexScreener scanner ready with red/green flags detection.
Research FOMO app - how to get wallet addresses from top traders
Research complete: FOMO is mobile-only app, no public web/API. Alternative: Use DexScreener trending + GMGN.ai for smart money tracking. Jupiter for bot execution, GMGN for manual UI.
